values: If you lag behind, you pull your entire team back
Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down
The trekkers who trained hard and showed up prepared won't take this lightly
Nobody wants to miss a summit or a breathtaking viewpoint because someone didn't train
If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back
That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team's safety

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you lag behind, you pull your entire team back. Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down. The trekkers who trained hard and showed up prepared won't take this lightly. Nobody wants to miss a summit or a breathtaking viewpoint because someone didn't train.

If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back. That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team's safety.

values: Walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes
This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for
Cardiovascular Endurance
Muscle Strength
Train your core, calves, glutes, quadriceps, and hamstrings

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Deoriatal Chandrashila Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
To reach any fitness target, there are two things you must work on: Cardiovascular Endurance, Muscle Strength
You need to train your core, calves, glutes, quadriceps, and hamstrings.

values: Track your runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app
Take 3 screenshots of your runs and upload them to your Indiahikes Dashboard
Make sure you upload these screenshots 15 to 20 days before your trek date
Your screenshots must demonstrate that you are meeting the fitness criteria for your trek
Your runs don't meet your trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month
Your fitness records will be rejected if you haven't uploaded your 3 screenshots to your dashboard
Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records

evidence.quote_or_summary: Track your runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app. Take 3 screenshots of your runs and upload them to your Indiahikes Dashboard. Make sure you upload these screenshots 15 to 20 days before your trek date. We want to see that you are being consistent in your preparation. Your screenshots must demonstrate that you are meeting the fitness criteria for your trek.

Your fitness records will be rejected for one of two reasons: You haven't uploaded your 3 screenshots to your dashboard. Your runs don't meet your trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month.
Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.
You can still trek. But your Trek Leader and Slope Manager will be informed about your fitness levels in advance.

values: If you're not fit, you won't enjoy your trek
You'll struggle
You'll fall behind
You'll miss out on the transformative experience
If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back
It is essential for your and the entire team's safety

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you're not fit, you won't enjoy your trek. Simple as that. You'll struggle. You'll fall behind. And you'll miss out on the transformative experience we've designed for you.

If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back. That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team's safety.
